description: The Latella 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a mafia-type organization based in Reggio Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Pasquale Latella, it controls the Ravagnese and Croce Valanidi quarters and is allied with the Ficara, De Stefano, and Pelle 'ndrine. The clan has been involved in feuds and alliances, notably during the Second 'Ndrangheta war, and was investigated in 2013 for monopolizing the construction sector. It remains active.
